nodes.label: AI as efficient summarizer for initial overview
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficient for detailed context
nodes.grounding_span: the summary does make it easier to see and understand helpful information

nodes.label: AI as roadmap to identify relevant details
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for detailed review
nodes.grounding_span: The summary can be helpful in mentioning an event or interaction that I know to go looking for

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: it is important the AI does not provide wrong information

nodes.label: Human emotional intelligence vs AI capability
nodes.label_negative: AI fully taking over human touch
nodes.grounding_span: the skills are mostly emotional intelligence based and it's hard to imagine AI fully taking over

nodes.label: Efficient information access
nodes.grounding_span: easier to see and understand helpful information

nodes.label: Client relationship preservation
nodes.grounding_span: could cause an error or mistake in working with the client that could lead to the client terminating the relationship

nodes.label: Human judgment and contextual understanding
nodes.grounding_span: human touch can still be very important

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as initial overview tool
nodes.grounding_span: Overall I think it is helpful

nodes.label: Frustration with AI lacking detailed information
nodes.grounding_span: where I have been left wanting is needing more detailed information

nodes.label: Concern about AI errors harming client relationships
nodes.grounding_span: if it provided wrong information, it could cause an error or mistake

nodes.label: Openness to AI expanding into other roles
nodes.grounding_span: I think it will expand into other areas to some extent

nodes.label: Preference for detailed review over summary reliance
nodes.grounding_span: it can be more helpful for me to review detailed notes instead of relying on just a summary

nodes.label: Risk-aware calibration of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: it is important the AI does not provide wrong information
